description: Phase 34 PR137 — Audit narrative for plan → skill (inner tool RequiresReview) → human approval → skill procedure completion → tail plan steps. Skill continuation is serialized on PlanResumeCursor; approval re-evaluates policy only in resume context; tail steps use the same PlanResumeOrchestrator failure policies as Phase 18.

auditSequence.description: Run starts for a sequential plan with a skill step whose first inner tool requires review.
Sequential plan execution begins.
First plan tool step executes and completes.
Skill plan step begins; inner tools are governed individually.
Inner tool at p1 is policy-evaluated; RequiresReview suspends the run inside the skill.
Plan execution suspended pending human review on the inner tool call.
Run status RequiresReview.
Resume cursor records remaining tail plan step(s) and SkillContinuation (inner checkpoint + non-canon procedure scratch state).
Human approves the blocked inner tool; decision is audit evidence only (no Athanor canonization).
Run returns to Running to finish the approved inner tool execution.
Post-approval policy for the blocked inner tool: Allow in resume context only.
Blocked inner tool executes after approval.
Inner tool completes; executor merges outputs into procedure state (evidence).
Remaining inner procedure steps run in order with fresh policy checks.
Skill plan step completes; plan-level skill step is completed once.
Trace marks the skill wrapper step completed after review-driven continuation.
Stored cursor cleared before tail plan resume (SkillContinuation stripped for orchestrator).
Tail plan segment resumes under PlanResumeOrchestrator (same semantics as Phase 18).
Resumed tail steps complete according to each step's FailureHandlingPolicy.
Plan completes after tail segment.
Run reaches Completed when no further review or failures stop the plan.

auditInvariants: No Athanor canonization events appear in this trace.
SkillContinuation is cleared before MultiStepPlanResumed for the tail segment.
ResumeAfterApprovedHumanReview applies to the approved inner tool only; later inner tools are fully re-evaluated.
RunCompleted is terminal when the plan finishes successfully.
